author: Simon Bissonnette
name: SP8192 CaseOps + Progressive 3k Context Growth + Short-Doc Score-First TTT
blurb: Builds on the merged PR #1855 CaseOps/SP8192/LQER/SparseAttnGate/BOS-fixed SmearGate stack, adding wallclock progressive training context growth to 3072 tokens, PR #1953-style long-context no_qv TTT settings, and a short-document score-first TTT chunk schedule (<=256 tokens uses chunk 8, <=2000 tokens uses chunk 24). Full validation target coverage is preserved: val_tokens == target_tokens == 47,853,343 in all included logs.
technique_summary: 11L 512d SP8192 CaseOps stack with LQER asymmetric rank-4 correction, SparseAttnGate, BOS-fixed SmearGate, Polar Express Muon, AWQ-lite, asymmetric logit rescale, per-group compression, wallclock progressive context growth (1024@10%, 2048@70%, 3072 final), QK_GAIN_INIT=5.25, no_qv LoRA TTT mask, TTT_LOCAL_LR_MULT=0.75, and short-document score-first TTT chunks (256:8, 2000:24).

compliance.score_before_update: Quantized phased TTT scores each validation chunk before the LoRA update; short-doc chunk schedule only changes chunk granularity.
